video_title: [Morimens] Flares' Awakener Review : Saya - Caro Support Unit : "Fake" A/S Tier unit, true B/C tier

author: @kingflares2
text:
Was a bit slow on this, cause IRL issues. Funeral prep. etc. Can't stream that much now as I have to prepare a lot of shit. Never die without a will. 
I'll prob make a separate video on what its like preparing for a funeral. Normally the person who died, did all of this. Anyway in regards to Saya

"Fake" A/S tier. She's a very good unit with wheel, but once you strip that away from here, her teams comps before very niche compared to prev anni units. There are many supports that do what she does better. If it weren't for the divine Caro Drawback, I wouldn't mind. Plus, 90% of you after watching this are beating her black and blue for her wheel to put on your teams. I also did testing for memes on putting her wheels on other comps just for the arith. Every single comp. Kath, bluwill, gelot, etc. Can perform better with it. None of you are actually gonna use Saya with her wheel, be honest. 

That is why I said "fake" a/s tier. If you are using her with the wheel. She's A tier min. Her BiS
video_title: [Morimens] Flares' Awakener Review : Saya - Caro Support Unit : "Fake" A/S Tier unit, true B/C tier

author: @kirarane6672
text:
What I got from this video
☆ Saya is great WITH her wheel
☆ Castor is BETTER with her wheel
☆ Saya with wheel is A to S tier and nonexistant without wheel
☆ If your going to whale do it on the wheel
☆ +12 Dore is WINNING whenever he rouses with Saya
☆ A lot of what Flares says is FOR ENDGAME A5 META. For below that do w.e your heart wants.
☆ If using Dore dont let the corrosion kill, so wait 1 turn for the KING
☆ Saya is better off not rousing in MOST cases. 
☆ Saya IS a corrosion BOT, queen bot, MAX OE baby
☆ Divine Caro sucks (hoping for buffs)

watched  until 4:30 and you fked up big time with your comparision.

author: @AliceQuitter
text:
I'm sorry for your loss. Thanks for getting the guide out ASAP in spite of that. You've saved so many of us from wasting pulls on a gassed-up mid with a clunky kit.

The bar was on the ground. All she had to do was provide a better alternative to running Alva on a Mouchette comp. We weren't asking her to support Mouchette better than Faint; we weren't even asking her to do better than Helot or Lotan. We just wanted her to be better than Alva, and she couldn't even achieve that.
video_title: [Morimens] Flares' Awakener Review : Saya - Caro Support Unit : "Fake" A/S Tier unit, true B/C tier

author: @DarkCT
text:
Can't say im surprised this is the conclusion you came too. Clunky is what she is. a rouse that obscures your own cards assuming you even give up the resources to access it. Corrosion that despite the rarity of the mechanic it crosses into a discard draw function when many teams are hand sculpting. Divine caro editing the tone of her embryo gen and functionality, causing her potential tempo issues in her element. she reads niche at best, and if anything a flavorful but troublesome character to play. not a great basis for a collab on pure mechanics. her discard draw can't even remove your entire hand, so you can't use it to pitch away symptons or states even. 

it's a shame in my eyes. I constantly credit the dev team for the thematic nature of their collabs, but this was 3 for 3 of me being here for a character release and not being excited about the mechanics at play. she still has her uses, but it all comes with strings attached.
video_title: [Morimens] Flares' Awakener Review : Saya - Caro Support Unit : "Fake" A/S Tier unit, true B/C tier

author: @NOGREE
text:
Вот окололитературный перевод песни от DeepSeek, если кому-то нужно:
Услышишь ли ты мой зов, когда тень растает в пустоте?
Отзовёшься ли на зов, имя в бездне шепча, лишь тебе?
Слышишь ли этот зов — сквозь песок, что уходит сквозь пальцы,
пусть забыта — но я всё ещё здесь.

Одуванчика пух, в течении одинок — меня уносит поток, и некуда мне.
Крылья, снежной листвой, извиваясь во мгле, чертят звёздный узор в темноте.
Лепестки в вышине — всё, что держим в руке, — капля чистой, истинной любви,
лишь она даст семени рост.
Слёзы знают, и пух — в этом мире внизу одинокий поиск, но тот звук не отпустит,

Осколки тишины вдохни — и чистый звук треснет, голос сорвётся.
Старые сны, память дней — гнилой сладостью кровь стынет в жилах.
Эхо спорит с огнём, сквозь разломы и щели, круша и сжимая в тиски —
лишь забыть и отпустить… но я знаю: прочувствовать — значит понять.

Как упавший листок, что уходит в путь, растворяясь в серой мгле,
Тени тают следом, исчезая в дымке, сбившись с пути.
